title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・3人の未来

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin defeats Biwa Hayahide in the
spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her loss, Biwa Hayahide is in good spirits
after witnessing Narita Taishin run so
wholeheartedly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is envious of the fun race that
Narita Taishin and Biwa Hayahide shared...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the Twinkle Series is not over yet, and they'll
have as many chances as they want to race
together again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The BNW trio promises to once again face off at
the autumn Tenno Sho.
